title: Bridge Essay: Functional Connectivity of Prefrontal Cortex in Various Meditation Techniques -

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Functional Connectivity of Prefrontal Cortex in Various Meditation Techniques - A Mini-Review.** — International journal of yoga (2022). DOI: 10.4103/ijoy.ijoy_88_22. PMID: 36949839. Meditation is a practice of concentration and relaxation. In philosophical terms, it is a process of gaining self-consciousness. Although there is diversity in meditation (Mindfulness, compassion, transcendental, and focused attention meditation), interventions show that meditation practices improve prefrontal cortex (PFC) functions like cognition, self-awareness, attention, and memory and reduce psychological symptoms.
